task_completion.description: Verify that 'Allow Guest Subscription' is enabled in the newsletter settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin Panel (Stores > Configuration > Customers > Newsletter), the dropdown for 'Allow Guest Subscription' should be set to 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Need to Confirm' is disabled in the newsletter settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin Panel (Stores > Configuration > Customers > Newsletter), the dropdown for 'Need to Confirm' should be set to 'No'.

task_completion.description: Verify the newsletter template is created with the correct name, subject, sender name, and sender email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Marketing > Newsletter Templates, the template form should show Template Name: 'Holiday Collection 2024', Template Subject: 'Discover Our Holiday Collection - Exclusive Early Access', Sender Name: 'NestWell Home', and Sender Email: 'newsletter@nestwell-home.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify the newsletter template content contains the required HTML structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence:
In the template content editor, the text must include HTML tags: an

tag containing 'Holiday Collection', a

tag for a paragraph, and a list (

    or
      ) containing at least three
    1. items.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 5 specified customers are subscribed to the newsletter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Marketing > Newsletter Subscribers or Customers > All Customers, the users Alice Johnson, Bob Smith, Carol Williams, David Brown, and Emma Davis (or their respective emails) should be visible and marked with a 'Subscribed' status.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Magento Admin Panel or frontend in a web browser, not terminal commands or database clients.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually saved the configurations and templates.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show success messages like 'You saved the configuration' or 'The newsletter template has been saved', rather than just filled-out forms that were never submitted.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use external scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent writing or executing Python, Bash, or SQL scripts to insert the template or subscribe the users directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Configuration Path: Stores > Configuration > Customers > Newsletter. Template Name: 'Holiday Collection 2024'. Template Subject: 'Discover Our Holiday Collection - Exclusive Early Access'. Sender Name: 'NestWell Home'. Sender Email: 'newsletter@nestwell-home.com'. Required HTML tags: h1, p, li. Target customer emails: alice.johnson@example.com, bob.smith@example.com, carol.williams@example.com, david.brown@example.com, emma.davis@example.com.
